summary: Tested Trade Monitor page layout restructure and Admin Members Export Debug Data button. All features PASSED: 2-column grid with right sidebar (Multiplier/Dream/Sound), 3-part LOT row, 3-column time/summary/merin grid, full-width Trade History. Export Debug Data button works in Admin Members page.
critical_code_review_comments: - Left column: Active Signal, LOT/Calculator/Exit row, Trade Control
- Right column: Multiplier panel (×15), Dream button, Sound toggle
- time-card: Your Time with Philippines and local time
- todays-summary-card: Today's Summary with Actual Total and P/L Diff
VERIFIED: Trade History card full-width below the 3-column grid
VERIFIED: Right sidebar visible on desktop (hidden lg:flex)
VERIFIED: Admin Members Export Debug Data:
- Response includes: export_meta, user_profile, trades, deposits, withdrawals, etc.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 92 verified: Trade Monitor layout restructure with 2-column grid (left content + right sidebar on desktop). Key data-testids: active-signal-card, lot-size-card, calculator-card, projected-exit-card, lot-exit-row, trade-control-card, right-sidebar-panel, multiplier-panel, dream-panel, sound-panel, time-card, todays-summary-card, merin-panel, trade-history-card. Admin Members page has export-debug-data-button that triggers download of comprehensive JSON debug data.
